_comment: Polymarket US fee schedule. Effective April 3 2026. Sole source of truth for all fee calculations in PM-Tennis. Do not modify during an active observation window.

promotions.name: 50% taker rebate
promotions.description: Promotional 50% rebate on all taker fees, applied weekly to all markets
promotions.note: During this window the effective taker theta is halved to 0.025

worked_examples.description: Taker fee at p=0.50, 100 contracts, no promotion
Taker fee at p=0.55, 25 contracts, with 50% promo (effective theta 0.025)

strategy_implications.passive_entry_passive_exit: Both legs earn maker rebate (theta=0.0125 each leg). Net cost is negative — a small credit.
strategy_implications.passive_entry_sell_at_market_exit: Entry earns maker rebate, exit pays taker fee (theta=0.05 or 0.025 during promo). Net cost depends on price and promotion status.
strategy_implications.note: Fee accounting is applied leg-by-leg by the replay simulator.

_lock_note: Set locked=true and record observation_window_start when observation window opens. Any change while locked=true ends the current observation window per Section 9.6.
